mapper.select:
SELECT TCCT.BUYER_CD , TCCT.CONT_NUM , TCCT.CONT_CNT , TCCT.PROGRESS_CD , TCCT.USER_NM AS USER_NM , TCCT.USER_ID , TCCT.BIRTH_DATE AS BIRTH_DATE ,(SELECT GENDER FROM STOCTVUR WHERE USER_ID = TCCT.USER_ID )AS GENDER , TCCT.PHONE_NUM AS CELL_NUM , TCCT.JIKMU_NAME , TCCT.POSITION , TO_CHAR(TCCT.CONT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_DATE , TO_CHAR(TCCT.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TCCT.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_END_DATE , TCCT.G_PLACE , SUBSTR(TCCT.WORK_TIME,1,2) AS WORK_TIME_HOUR , SUBSTR(TCCT.WORK_TIME,3,4) AS WORK_TIME_MIN , SUBSTR(TCCT.REST_TIME,1,2) AS REST_TIME_HOUR , SUBSTR(TCCT.REST_TIME,3,4) AS REST_TIME_MIN , TCCT.DAY1 , TCCT.DAY2 , TCCT.DAY3 , TCCT.DAY4 , TCCT.DAY5 , TCCT.DAY6 , TCCT.DAY7 , TCCT.DAY8 , TCCT.DAY9 , TCCT.DAY10 , TCCT.DAY11 , TCCT.DAY12 , TCCT.DAY13 , TCCT.DAY14 , TCCT.DAY15 , TCCT.DAY16 , TCCT.DAY17 , TCCT.DAY18 , TCCT.DAY19 , TCCT.DAY20 , TCCT.DAY21 , TCCT.DAY22 , TCCT.DAY23 , TCCT.DAY24 , TCCT.DAY25 , TCCT.DAY26 , TCCT.DAY27 , TCCT.DAY28 , TCCT.DAY29 , TCCT.DAY30 , TCCT.DAY31 , TO_CHAR(TCCT.EDU_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS EDU_DATE , SUBSTR(TCCT.EDU_TIME_START,1,2) AS EDU_TIME_START_HOUR , SUBSTR(TCCT.EDU_TIME_START,3,4) AS EDU_TIME_START_MIN , SUBSTR(TCCT.EDU_TIME_END,1,2) AS EDU_TIME_END_HOUR , SUBSTR(TCCT.EDU_TIME_END,3,4) AS EDU_TIME_END_MIN , TCCT.EDU_HOUR , TCCT.EDU_PLACE , TCCT.EDU_PLACE_RMKS , TCCT.EDU_WAY , TCCT.EDU_WAY_RMKS , TCCT.TH_NAME , TCCT.CONT_TYPE , TCCT.K_ADDRAS K_ADDR , TCCT.DAY_OR_HOUR_PAY , TCCT.WORKER_PAY_AMT , TCCT.WORK_DAY , TCCT.SPECIAL_CONDITION ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = TCCT.PDF_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PDF_ATT_FILE_CNT , TCCT.APP_DOC_NUM , TCCT.APP_DOC_CNT , TCRL.CONTRACT_TEXT_NUM , TCCT.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM AS EMP_ATT_FILE_NUM , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = TCCT.GATE_CD AND UUID = TCCT.VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS EMP_ATT_FILE_CNT , TCCT.JIKJONG_TYPE , TCCT.WORK_CONDITION , TCCT.REST_CONDITION FROM STOCTCCT TCCT JOIN STOCTCRL TCRL ON (TCCT.GATE_CD = TCRL.GATE_CD AND TCCT.BUYER_CD = TCRL.BUYER_CD AND TCCT.CONT_NUM = TCRL.CONT_NUM AND TCCT.CONT_CNT = TCRL.CONT_CNT AND TCRL.FORM_SQ = '0' AND TCRL.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECCF ECCF ON (TCRL.GATE_CD = ECCF.GATE_CD AND TCRL.FORM_NUM = ECCF.FORM_NUM AND ECCF.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE TCCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TCCT.BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} AND TCCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND TCCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND TCCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT}

SELECT CF.GATE_CD , CF.FORM_NUM , CF.FORM_NM , CF.BUYER_CD , CF.FORM_TEXT_NUM , CF.FORM_TYPE , CF.APPROVAL_FLAG , CF.BUNDLE_FLAG , CF.ECONT_FLAG , CF.CONT_TYPE AS CONTRACT_FORM_TYPE , (CF.AUTO_RENEW_FLAG, '0') AS AUTO_RENEW_FLAG , CF.FORM_FILE_NM , '0' AS FORM_SQ FROM STOCECCF CF WHERE CF.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CF.FORM_TYPE = '100' -- 주서식(100), 부서식(200) AND CF.SIGN_STATUS = 'E' AND CF.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND CF.USE_FLAG = '1' AND CF.FORM_FILE_NM IN('CCPR1200')
AND CF.FORM_FILE_NM NOT IN ( 'CCTR1040_C00066', 'CCTR1070_C00066', 'CCTR1300' )
AND (CF.BUNDLE_FLAG, '0') = #{bundleFlag} --일괄계약 여부
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT MAX(FORM_NUM) FROM STOCTCRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT (CASE WHEN MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) = 'FORM20080013' THEN (SELECT TEXT1 AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODE_TYPE = 'NH0056' AND CODE = 'FORM20080013') WHEN MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) = 'FORM20080019' THEN (SELECT TEXT1 AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODE_TYPE = 'NH0056' AND CODE = 'FORM20080019') WHEN MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) = 'FORM20080012' THEN (SELECT TEXT1 AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCCODD WHERE GATE_CD = '100' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODE_TYPE = 'NH0056' AND CODE = 'FORM20080012') ELSE MAX(RL.FORM_NUM) END) AS FORM_NUM FROM STOCTCRL RL WHERE RL.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RL.BUYER_CD = #{PRE_BUYER_CD} AND RL.CONT_NUM = #{PRE_CONT_NUM} AND RL.CONT_CNT = #{PRE_CONT_CNT} AND RL.FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND RL.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY RL.FORM_NUM)
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT MAX(FORM_NUM) FROM STOCTCRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{PRE_BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = #{PRE_CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{PRE_CONT_CNT} AND FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND CF.FORM_NUM = (SELECT MAX(FORM_NUM) FROM STOCTCRL WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND CONT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONT_NUM) FROM STOCTCCT WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AND FORM_SQ = 0 -- 주서식 AND DEL_FLAG = '0')
AND UPPER(CF.FORM_NM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{BASIC_SEARCH}) '%'
AND (CF.BUYER_CD = (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) OR CF.NH_COMM_FLAG = '1')
AND (CF.BUYER_CD = ((#{BUYER_CD}, #{PRE_BUYER_CD}), #{ses.companyCd}))
AND CF.BUYER_CD = ((#{BUYER_CD}, #{PRE_BUYER_CD}), #{ses.companyCd})
ORDER BY CF.BUYER_CD , CF.FORM_TYPE , CF.CONT_TYPE , CF.FORM_NM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCTCCT ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , DEPT_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONT_DATE , CONT_START_DATE , CONT_END_DATE , CONT_USER_ID , USER_ID , USER_NM , BIRTH_DATE , PHONE_NUM , K_ADDR , JIKMU_NAME , BUSINESS , POSITION , G_PLACE , WORK_TIME , REST_TIME , SPECIAL_CONDITION , CONT_DESC , ATT_FILE_NUM , SIGN_STATUS , BUNDLE_NUM , DAY1 , DAY2 , DAY3 , DAY4 , DAY5 , DAY6 , DAY7 , DAY8 , DAY9 , DAY10 , DAY11 , DAY12 , DAY13 , DAY14 , DAY15 , DAY16 , DAY17 , DAY18 , DAY19 , DAY20 , DAY21 , DAY22 , DAY23 , DAY24 , DAY25 , DAY26 , DAY27 , DAY28 , DAY29 , DAY30 , DAY31 , EDU_DATE , EDU_TIME_START , EDU_TIME_END , EDU_HOUR , EDU_PLACE , EDU_PLACE_RMKS , EDU_WAY , EDU_WAY_RMKS , TH_NAME , CONT_TYPE , SEND_YN , DAY_OR_HOUR_PAY , WORKER_PAY_AMT , WORK_DAY , CUST_NAME , SUBCUST_NAME , JIKJONG_TYPE , WORK_CONDITION , REST_CONDITION ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} , #{ses.companyCd} , #{ses.deptCd} , #{CONT_NUM} , #{CONT_CNT} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , #{PROGRESS_CD} ,(#{CONT_DATE}, SYSDATE) , #{CONT_START_DATE} , #{CONT_END_DATE} , #{ses.userId} , #{USER_ID} , #{USER_NM} , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{BIRTH_DATE}),'YYYY-MM-DD') , #{CELL_NUM} , #{K_ADDR} , #{JIKMU_NAME} , #{JIKMU_NAME} , #{POSITION} , #{G_PLACE} , #{WORK_TIME} , #{REST_TIME} , #{SPECIAL_CONDITION} , #{CONT_DESC} , #{ATT_FILE_NUM} , #{SIGN_STATUS} , #{BUNDLE_NUM} , (#{DAY1}, '0') , (#{DAY2}, '0') , (#{DAY3}, '0') , (#{DAY4}, '0') , (#{DAY5}, '0') , (#{DAY6}, '0') , (#{DAY7}, '0') , (#{DAY8}, '0') , (#{DAY9}, '0') , (#{DAY10}, '0') , (#{DAY11}, '0') , (#{DAY12}, '0') , (#{DAY13}, '0') , (#{DAY14}, '0') , (#{DAY15}, '0') , (#{DAY16}, '0') , (#{DAY17}, '0') , (#{DAY18}, '0') , (#{DAY19}, '0') , (#{DAY20}, '0') , (#{DAY21}, '0') , (#{DAY22}, '0') , (#{DAY23}, '0') , (#{DAY24}, '0') , (#{DAY25}, '0') , (#{DAY26}, '0') , (#{DAY27}, '0') , (#{DAY28}, '0') , (#{DAY29}, '0') , (#{DAY30}, '0') , (#{DAY31}, '0') , #{EDU_DATE} , #{EDU_TIME_START} , #{EDU_TIME_END} , #{EDU_HOUR} , #{EDU_PLACE} , #{EDU_PLACE_RMKS} , #{EDU_WAY} , #{EDU_WAY_RMKS} , #{TH_NAME} , #{CONT_TYPE} , '0' , #{DAY_OR_HOUR_PAY} , DECODE(#{WORKER_PAY_AMT},'null',0, TO_NUMBER(#{WORKER_PAY_AMT})) , #{WORK_DAY} , #{CUST_NAME} , #{SUBCUST_NAME} , #{JIKJONG_TYPE} , #{WORK_CONDITION} , #{REST_CONDITION} )
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCTCCT SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} , PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD} , CONT_DATE = #{CONT_DATE} , CONT_START_DATE = #{CONT_START_DATE} , CONT_END_DATE = #{CONT_END_DATE} , CONT_DESC = #{CONT_DESC} , CONT_REQ_CD = #{CONT_REQ_CD} , USER_ID = #{USER_ID} , USER_NM = #{USER_NM} , BIRTH_DATE = TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{BIRTH_DATE}),'YYYY-MM-DD') , PHONE_NUM = #{CELL_NUM} , JIKMU_NAME = #{JIKMU_NAME} , BUSINESS = #{JIKMU_NAME} , POSITION = #{POSITION} , G_PLACE = #{G_PLACE} , WORK_TIME = #{WORK_TIME} , REST_TIME = #{REST_TIME} , SPECIAL_CONDITION = #{SPECIAL_CONDITION} , SIGN_STATUS = #{SIGN_STATUS} , BUNDLE_NUM = #{BUNDLE_NUM} , K_ADDR = #{K_ADDR} , DAY1 = (#{DAY1}, '0') , DAY2 = (#{DAY2}, '0') , DAY3 = (#{DAY3}, '0') , DAY4 = (#{DAY4}, '0') , DAY5 = (#{DAY5}, '0') , DAY6 = (#{DAY6}, '0') , DAY7 = (#{DAY7}, '0') , DAY8 = (#{DAY8}, '0') , DAY9 = (#{DAY9}, '0') , DAY10 = (#{DAY10}, '0') , DAY11 = (#{DAY11}, '0') , DAY12 = (#{DAY12}, '0') , DAY13 = (#{DAY13}, '0') , DAY14 = (#{DAY14}, '0') , DAY15 = (#{DAY15}, '0') , DAY16 = (#{DAY16}, '0') , DAY17 = (#{DAY17}, '0') , DAY18 = (#{DAY18}, '0') , DAY19 = (#{DAY19}, '0') , DAY20 = (#{DAY20}, '0') , DAY21 = (#{DAY21}, '0') , DAY22 = (#{DAY22}, '0') , DAY23 = (#{DAY23}, '0') , DAY24 = (#{DAY24}, '0') , DAY25 = (#{DAY25}, '0') , DAY26 = (#{DAY26}, '0') , DAY27 = (#{DAY27}, '0') , DAY28 = (#{DAY28}, '0') , DAY29 = (#{DAY29}, '0') , DAY30 = (#{DAY30}, '0') , DAY31 = (#{DAY31}, '0') , DAY_OR_HOUR_PAY = #{DAY_OR_HOUR_PAY} , WORKER_PAY_AMT = #{WORKER_PAY_AMT} , WORK_DAY = #{WORK_DAY} , JIKJONG_TYPE = #{JIKJONG_TYPE} , WORK_CONDITION = #{WORK_CONDITION} , REST_CONDITION = #{REST_CONDITION} WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
